signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 CPI: Annual Inflation at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 CPI: Annual Inflation at 2.2% YoY (vs 2.0% Prior, 2.3-2.4% Expected) | NO | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual consumer price inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in February, driven by higher oil prices amid Middle East tensions, but came in below market consensus of 2.3-2.4% due to government measures like fuel price caps and food vouchers.[1][2] Monthly CP
